root: Cross-platform browser cookie source (macOS / Linux / Windows) lands as first-class auth: read straight from Chrome/Arc/Dia/Brave/Edge/Atlas SQLite DBs via the native key store; default cascade is `~/.unicli/cookies → BROWSER → CDP`.

`unicli auth audit` and `unicli doctor cookies` round out the cross-platform cookie surface; the `domain:` field is plumbed through every pipeline caller and silently corrects ten adapters whose naïve `<site>.com` derivation pointed at the wrong cookie store.

Pipeline engine hardening: `parsePipes` no longer mistreats the second `|` of a `||` as a filter pipe (the bug silently dropped Homebrew and OpenRouter search rows), unknown filter names now throw `TemplateEvalError` instead of being silently skipped, and the shorthand `- navigate: <url>` form is finally accepted by the navigate step (used by 58 adapters).

Documentation discipline: a quarantine honesty invariant test asserts every `quarantine: true` carries a dated reason; release.ts now propagates version + codename to all nine tracked surfaces (added `docs/zh/ROADMAP.md`, `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`, and `docs/release-info.json`) so a release leaves no stale tag pointer.
zh: 跨平台浏览器 Cookie 源（macOS / Linux / Windows）成为一等公民认证：直接从 Chrome/Arc/Dia/Brave/Edge/Atlas 的 SQLite DB 通过原生 key store 读取；默认级联 `~/.unicli/cookies → BROWSER → CDP`。
`unicli auth audit` 与 `unicli doctor cookies` 让跨平台 cookie 体系自洽；`domain:` 字段已贯穿所有 pipeline 调用方，悄悄修正了十个把 cookie 域名猜成 `<site>.com` 的 adapter。
Pipeline 引擎收紧：`parsePipes` 不再把 `||` 第二个 `|` 误判为 filter（旧 bug 让 Homebrew / OpenRouter 搜索默默掉行），未知 filter 名抛出 `TemplateEvalError` 不再静默吞掉，`- navigate: <url>` 简写终于被 navigate step 接受（58 个 adapter 受益）。
文档纪律：新增 quarantine 诚实不变量测试要求每个 `quarantine: true` 带日期；release.ts 同步覆盖到全部 9 个文档面（新加 `docs/zh/ROADMAP.md`、`docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`、`docs/release-info.json`），发版后不再有残留的旧版本指针。
